title: Moves Like the Wind
summary: You can move so fast that you become a blur.
tiers: Tier 3: Speed Burst or Greater Enhanced Speed
Tier 6: Perfect Speed Burst or Incredible Running Speed
gm_intrusions: Surfaces can be slick or offer hidden obstacles. The movement of other creatures can be unpredictable, and the character might run into them.
text: You can move so fast that you become a blur.
details: You can move so fast that you become a blur.
